jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer (Vue 3 / TypeScript) - N-iX
jobs.rawDescription: We are a leading European AI company developing large language models and generative platforms for enterprise and government clients. Our products combine high-performance technologies, transparency, accessibility, and data security, fully aligned with European regulatory and ethical standards. As a Senior Frontend Engineer, you will take ownership of building scalable, accessible, and high-quality user interfaces, including chat-based AI experiences. You will work closely with product, design, and backend teams to deliver inclusive, reliable, and maintainable frontend systems. Responsibilities * Design, build, and maintain frontend applications using Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, and Vite * Own and promote Accessibility (A11y) standards, ensuring inclusive user experiences * Develop and maintain chat-based user interfaces integrated with backend APIs * Write and maintain End-to-End tests using Playwright * Work within a Nx monorepo and contribute to frontend architecture decisions * Ensure high code quality through reviews, testing, and best practices * Optimize performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability * Collaborate closely with designers, backend engineers, and product managers Requirements * 4+ years of professional frontend development experience (most of which should have been in a production setup with real customers) * Strong expertise in Vue.js (Vue 3) and TypeScript * Proven experience implementing accessibility (A11y) standards * Experience with state management (Pinia or similar) * Solid experience with E2E testing (Playwright or equivalent) * Strong CSS skills and experience with responsive design * Experience working in monorepo environments (Nx or similar) * Ability to take ownership and contribute at an architectural level Nice to have * Experience building chat, messaging, or real-time interfaces * Familiarity with WebSockets, SSE, or real-time data flows * Experience with AI-powered user interfaces * Experience with design systems or comp

score.reason: Strong Vue 3/TypeScript/Pinia match with senior-level architecture role at an AI company. Remote Spain-based position with timezone compatibility and manageable learning curve on A11y and Playwright.

Formación continua : Acceso a Udemy Business, cursos de idiomas, certificaciones oficiales y formación técnica. Plan de carrera

jobs.title: Desarrollador/a Frontend Vue js 3
jobs.rawDescription: Buscamos un/a Desarrollador/a FrontEnd especializado en Vue3 con al menos 3 años de experiencia para incorporarse a un proyecto en entorno Microsoft Azure. La persona seleccionada participará en el desarrollo de interfaces modernas, así como en la automatización de despliegues mediante pipelines CI/CD, trabajando en un entorno Agile y colaborando estrechamente con equipos multidisciplinares. Para ser considerado para una entrevista, por favor, asegúrese de que su solicitud se ajusta plenamente a las especificaciones del puesto que se encuentran a continuación. Funciones principales: Desarrollo de interfaces de usuario dinámas, escalables y modulares utilizando Vue 3. Implementación y mantenimiento de pipelines CI/CD para despliegues en entornos Azure (Web Apps, App Services, Azure DevOps, AKS - CaaS). Asegurar la calidad del código mediante pruebas automatizadas y cobertura (test cases). Colaboración con equipos de backend y arquitectura para optimizar integraciones. Participación en code reviews y mejora continua de buenas prácticas FrontEnd. Requisitos imprescindibles: Experiencia ≥3 años en desarrollo FrontEnd. Dominio avanzado de Vue3 y su ecosistema (Composition API, Vue Router, Pinia/Vuex). Experiencia con TypeScript o lenguajes tipados. Conocimientos sólidos en Microsoft Azure (CI/CD, despliegues, Azure DevOps). Experiencia en testing (Jest, Mocha, Cypress o similares). Requisitos valorables: Conocimientos en .NET, Python, React o Angular. Experiencia con arquitectura de microservicios y APIs REST. xiphteb Buenas prácticas de documentación y control de versiones (Git). Condiciones del puesto: Modalidad: Remoto (SPAIN ONLY) Horario: Lunes a jueves: 09:00 – 18:00 Viernes: 08:00 – 15:00 Jornada de verano: Lunes a viernes de 08:00 – 15:00 Ofrecemos: Contrato indefinido con CAS Training Formar parte de un equipo europeo de alto nivel técnico en un entorno innovador Paquete retributivo atractivo y flexible, negociado según tu experiencia Acceso gratuito a nuestro C

jobs.title: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS
jobs.location: Berlin Office (+ Albania, Bosnia, Bulgaria, Croatia, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Kosovo, Latvia, Lithuania, Moldova, Montenegro, Poland, Serbia, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Ukraine, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Sweden, Greece, Italy, Portugal, Spain, London Office, United Kingdom, Austria, Belgium, France, Ireland, Netherlands)
jobs.rawDescription: Sr AI Engineer | Remote - Europe | TS/Vue/NodeJS The AI orchestration of your wildest imagination. n8n is the open workflow orchestration platform built for the new era of AI. We give technical teams the freedom of code with the speed of no-code, so they can automate faster, smarter, and without limits. Backed by a fiercely inventive community and 500+ builder-approved integrations, we’re changing the way people bring systems together and scale ideas for impact. Since our founding in 2019, we’ve grown into a diverse team of over 220 - working across Europe and the US, connected by a shared builder spirit and with our centre of gravity in Berlin. Along the way, we’ve: Cultivated a community of more than 650,000 active developers and builders Earned 145k+ GitHub stars, making us one of the world’s Top 40 most popular projects Been ranked as one of Europe’s most promising privately held SaaS startups (4th in Sifted’s 2025 B2B SaaS Rising 100) Raised $240m to date, from Sequoia’s first German seed to our recent $180m Series C - bringing us to a $2.5bn valuation That’s the company we’ve built. Now we’d love to see what you can build. If you’re applying, try n8n out - whether you’re technical or not - and share a screenshot of your first workflow with us. The easiest place to start is here: app.n8n.cloud/register . We’re in a defining moment of an incredible journey. Come and build with us. As a Senior AI Engineer, you'll drive intelligent features that redefine how users build automations. You'll build AI-powered capabilities, from natural language input to smart suggestions, that make creating workflows faster and more intuitive. You'll collaborate across engineering, product, and design to bring generative AI and LLM-based enhancements into the core user experience. You'll improve existing AI integrations, develop new ones, and shape how AI powers our product. You’ll work across the entire AI feature lifecycle: Architect and implement AI-powered capabilities : code gen

score.reason: AI-focused role (LLM features, code generation, generative AI) where Vue is secondary support. Alfonso is a frontend specialist, not an AI engineer. Requires deep Node.js/LLM expertise; his strength is UI, not AI orchestration.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer (Node/Vue/TypeScript) - Remote Europe
jobs.location: Remote (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Node/Vue/TypeScript) - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities You will join and work on our book editing tool. Here's what you'll do: Work closely with our designers and engineers to design, build, and ship new features from scratch; Extend the growing feature set of our cutting-edge, collaborative word processor; Deliver real value to our users by crafting beautiful book templates for their e-readers and for print; Architect and develop highly scalable web applications; Evaluate and improve the performance, durability, and security of applications in production; Take ownership for your tasks and see features through from start to finish; Help teammates improve when reviewing their work and appreciate feedback when they reciprocate. Requirements Professional experience with NodeJS, VueJS, TypeScript and NoSQL (Redis, MongoDB) databases. A good understanding of modern HTML and CSS. Strong test-driven approach to development. Perfectly fluent in English. Enjoy working remotely. Bonus points Professional experience with building and deploying Single Page Apps. Knowledge of ShareDB and LaTeX. Experience with CSS pre-processors, such as SASS or LESS. Experience building production-grade applications integrating LLMs. Experience with build-chain and deployment automation tools, such as Webpack and Github Actions. needsReview.title: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK
needsReview.rawDescription: Senior Software Engineer (Frameworks), JavaScript SDK About Sentry Bad software is everywhere, and we’re tired of it. Sentry is on a mission to help developers write better software faster so we can get back to enjoying technology. With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you like to selfishly build things that make your digital life better, come help us build the next generation of software monitoring tools. About this role Are you ready to redefine the future of JavaScript development? Are you a seasoned JavaScript expert who gets a thrill from tackling complex challenges across the entire JavaScript ecosystem? Do you believe that AI can be a powerful partner in crafting elegant, high-impact code? If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. You'll be at the forefront, working on: A Universe of JavaScript Challenges: Dive deep into our extensive suite of JavaScript SDKs, with a broad focus on framework support spanning the mode

score.reason: Toronto-based hybrid with mandatory in-office anchor days (incompatible with CET timezone). SDK development across frameworks, not Vue application work. Node.js expertise insufficient.

needsReview.title: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural lang
needsReview.company: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed d
needsReview.location: Hi! We're Ontix. We're building the business layer to connect siloed datasets and query them with natural language, offering insights to SMBs they couldn't get before. We're fully funded by our sibling company, and are looking for remote freelancers in the US and full-time, onsite employees in San Diego, California (if you're into that kind of thing). We're looking for experience in the following roles: + QA: We're looking for a QA engineer deeply familiar with the software lifecycle in the age of agentic coding. You'd have a lot of responsibility, but also the opportunity to define what solid QA looks like at Ontix. + Azure Cloud Engineer: We're a mostly-AWS shop, but we have a few potential customers that are deeply entrenched in the Azure ecosystem, including a migration from SharePoint to Fabric + OneLake. You'd be leading the charge on that. + Infosec + Automated Vulnerability Scanning: If you browse new CVEs over breakfast, we want to talk to you. There's a huge demand among our current customers for continuous vulnerability scanning, both in the codebase and on the deployed edge. We have some test platforms, but would love a more robust solution we can market. + Full-Stack WordPress Developer: Our sister company is a bit old school still: If you can parachute in to a PHP + Vue 2/3 + WordPress + AWS EC2 environment, we would love to pass on your number to them. We're looking to grow quickly as our client base expands. Healthcare, vision, and 401(k) for FTEs. If you're interested in any of these roles, or would like more information in general about us, please visit https://ontix.io or email l33t@ontix.io with a few sentences describing your experience, interest, and where you're located.

This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

score.reason: No Vue.js in stack (F1 hard filter failure) and hybrid Paris role incompatible with Spain-based location (F2 failure). Backend-focused engineering lead requiring deep Node.js expertise—outside primary frontend specialization.
